hints.description: This financial services company provides a wide range of banking, investment, and wealth management solutions to businesses and individuals. They offer services like commercial lending, investment banking, private banking, and retail banking through a network of branches and digital platforms. Notably, the company was formed in 2019 through the merger of BB&T and SunTrust Banks, creating a significant player in the Southeast.
hints.funFact1: Before the merger, BB&T, one of the companies that formed *****, famously held an annual "Spirit Week" where employees competed in quirky challenges like building the tallest structure out of office supplies and participating in themed costume days, fostering a unique and playful company culture.
hints.funFact2: The current CEO, Kelly S. King, served as CEO of BB&T for over a decade before leading the combined entity, demonstrating a long and successful career in the banking industry.
